author: Sarah Sluis
title: Data Privacy At The Kitchen Table
description: We open with insights from attending a duo of privacy conferences this week, the IAPP Global Summit and IAB Public Policy & Legal Summit, including one reason regulators are paying more attention to data privacy: Their constituents consider it a “kitchen tabl…
content:
Lawmakers pay attention to what the electorate cares about, which includes data privacy.
An issue that once made peoples’ eyes glaze over has now become a “kitchen table” topic, said Krista Griffith… [+2025 chars]
